scope.city: only records whose city contains Astana/Астана
scope.temporal: valid_from < prediction_datetime + 24h and valid_to is null or > prediction_datetime

classification.severity: 1-5, multiplied by local capacity proxy when known

geocoding: known local venue directory first, then bounded Astana Nominatim; unresolved venue remains null with warning
spatial_matching: Stage 17 matches validated points by 1000m Ticketon radius; unresolved geometry remains unmatched
canonical_storage: all parsed in-window Astana events, including small events, are stored; no transport-relevance exclusion exists
segment_features: only Stage 17 matched Ticketon records contribute; unmatched events do not create segment event counts
